name: Poison Luck Scaling
description:
Adds Luck-based scaling to the Poison attacks of Wyverns, Wyvern Monarchs, Sea Serpents and Haspids.

This module gives **Wyverns** a new chance to trigger **Poison** when they have positive Luck. **Wyvern Monarchs**, **Sea Serpents** and **Haspids** keep their existing Poison attacks and have their chances modified by both positive and negative Luck.

## Creature Changes

* **Wyvern** — gains a chance to trigger **Poison** only with positive Luck.
  * **+1 Luck**: 6% Poison chance.
  * **+2 Luck**: 13% Poison chance.
  * **+3 or higher Luck**: 20% Poison chance.

* **Wyvern Monarch** — keeps its existing **Poison** attack and has its chance adjusted by Luck.
  * **-3 or lower Luck**: Poison chance is reduced by 20%.
  * **-2 Luck**: Poison chance is reduced by 13%.
  * **-1 Luck**: Poison chance is reduced by 6%.
  * **+1 Luck**: Poison chance is increased by an additional 6%.
  * **+2 Luck**: Poison chance is increased by an additional 13%.
  * **+3 or higher Luck**: Poison chance is increased by an additional 20%.

* **Sea Serpent** — keeps its existing **Poison** attack and has its chance adjusted by Luck, with more conservative positive scaling.
  * **-3 or lower Luck**: Poison chance is reduced by 20%.
  * **-2 Luck**: Poison chance is reduced by 13%.
  * **-1 Luck**: Poison chance is reduced by 6%.
  * **+1 Luck**: Poison chance is increased by an additional 3%.
  * **+2 Luck**: Poison chance is increased by an additional 7%.
  * **+3 or higher Luck**: Poison chance is increased by an additional 10%.

* **Haspid** — keeps its existing **Poison** attack and has its chance adjusted by Luck.
  * **-3 or lower Luck**: Poison chance is reduced by 20%.
  * **-2 Luck**: Poison chance is reduced by 13%.
  * **-1 Luck**: Poison chance is reduced by 6%.
  * **+1 Luck**: Poison chance is increased by an additional 6%.
  * **+2 Luck**: Poison chance is increased by an additional 13%.
  * **+3 or higher Luck**: Poison chance is increased by an additional 20%.
author: bew_
